task:
Build this app in Clear:

**User Profiles** (Level 5)

Build a user registration/login system with profiles. POST /api/register (email, password, name). POST /api/login returns token. GET /api/me returns current user profile (requires auth). PUT /api/me updates profile name.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending user:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  found = get all Users where email is credentials's email
  guard (length of found) is greater than 0 or 'Invalid credentials'
  user_record = first of found
  guard user_record's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid credentials'
  token = credentials's email
  send back { token is token } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/me:
  requires login
  send back caller with status 200

when user calls PUT /api/me sending changes:
  requires login
  caller's name is changes's name
  save caller to Users
  send back caller with status 200
